item.title:
TomCantonMedia: Tom Canton @TomCantonMedia · 5h Long day. The more I see of the replays in the game the more irritated I’ve become.
Ha
item.description:
Tom Canton @TomCantonMedia · 5h Long day. The more I see of the replays in the game the more irritated I’ve become.
Haaland’s huge shirt pull on Gabriel before the goal… not sure how that isn’t checked by VAR. The Khusanov red card (DOGSO).
Annoying. 21 44 611 15 mil

item.title:
FabrizioRomano: Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 5h Erling Haaland: “Bernardo Cannavaro Silva… Man of the Match!”.
“I remember there
item.description:
Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 5h Erling Haaland: “Bernardo Cannavaro Silva… Man of the Match!”.
“I remember there was a cross, I told him after when he headed it out: 'You were like f*cking Fabio Cannavaro!'”.
“Come on, we've all been swearing in all lives. Bernie, I'm not going to make it emotional but Mostrar más 391 916 17 mil 685 mil
